params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit shift register with parallel load capability. The shift register has the following inputs: a 16-bit data input (data_in), a load signal (load), a shift signal (shift), and a clock signal (clk). When the load signal is high, the data_in should be loaded into the register. When the shift signal is high, the data in the register should be shifted to the left by one position, with the most significant bit (MSB) shifting out. The least significant bit (LSB) should be filled with zero after shifting.
